Creator Onboarding · Guide

Build your Genie
profile, start to finish

A 13-step walkthrough from account creation to a fully live profile on GeniesX — verification, identity, gallery, and everything in between.

13 steps
·
~10 min setup
·
app.geniesx.com
Scroll to begin
01
Step 01 / 13

Create your account

Go to the registration page and make sure the account type is set to Genie (not Wisher) before filling in your details.

app.geniesx.com/register
02
Step 02 / 13

Verify your email

After signing up, a verification email is sent to your inbox. Click the link inside it to activate your account.

mail — verify your email
03
Step 03 / 13

Start identity verification

On your profile page, click “Start Identity Verification” to begin the verification process with DIDIT.

app.geniesx.com/verify
04
Step 04 / 13

Finish verification

Scan the QR code and complete ID verification plus a liveness selfie check to activate your Genie account.

DIDIT — identity check
05
Step 05 / 13

Sign in & register

On the GeniesX homepage, the “Register” button leads back to the account creation form whenever you need it.

geniesx.com
06
Step 06 / 13

Confirm you're 18+

Confirm you are over 18 on the adult-content warning screen to continue into the site.

app.geniesx.com
07
Step 07 / 13

Open settings

Click your profile picture in the corner, then select “Settings” to start managing your profile.

app.geniesx.com/settings
08
Step 08 / 13

Add profile picture & bio

Upload an avatar and write a display name and a short bio describing your profile to future Wishers.

app.geniesx.com/settings/profile
09
Step 09 / 13

Cover image & languages

Choose a cover image for your profile and add the languages you can communicate in.

app.geniesx.com/settings/profile
10
Step 10 / 13

Visibility & profile identity

Set your profile to Public or Private, define country rules, and fill in your profile identity details.

app.geniesx.com/settings/privacy
11
Step 11 / 13

Set your subscription price

Pick additional tags and attributes, then set a monthly subscription price for access to your private content.

app.geniesx.com/settings/monetization
12
Step 12 / 13

Create a gallery

In the “My Galleries” tab, create a new gallery: title, description, media type, and visibility level.

app.geniesx.com/galleries/new
13
Step 13 / 13

Check your final profile

Go to “View Profile” to see exactly how your profile looks to other users — you're ready to go live.

app.geniesx.com/genie/your_name

You're done — your profile is live

From verification to your first gallery, your profile is ready to welcome Wishers and publish content on GeniesX.

app.geniesx.com
GENIESX · CREATOR ONBOARDING GUIDE
